project.name: jobsync
project.description: JobSync is a free, open-source, self-hosted web app for managing the job-search journey. It tracks job applications locally, discovers and stages European vacancies via a pluggable Connector/Module ACL (EURES/ESCO/Arbeitsagentur/JSearch + AI matching), runs a personal CRM with Inside Track referral and warm-path discovery, delivers multi-channel notifications, and enforces GDPR/PII and IDOR-safe identity controls.

nodes.name: Job Application Tracking
nodes.summary: The core of JobSync: users record, organize and progress their job applications locally. Jobs move through a per-user configurable status pipeline (Kanban) with status-history logging and optimistic-locking concurrency control.

businessRules: Status transitions validated against allowed-transition graph
Optimistic locking via version field on update
All Job queries userId-scoped (ADR-015 IDOR)
Job aggregate owns Notes, Tags and Status together
crossDomainInteractions: Receives promoted vacancies from Vacancy Discovery & Staging
Receives applications committed from Inside Track referrals
Links to CRM Persons via JobContact join entity

nodes.name: Vacancy Discovery & Staging
nodes.summary: Scheduled automations search external job boards, dedupe and AI-match discovered vacancies against the user's resume, then stage them for triage. Users swipe/promote/dismiss staged vacancies (deck + list UI) and promote keepers into real Jobs.

businessRules: All runs route through RunCoordinator (mutex per automationId, no double-execution)
Dedup against existing vacancies/jobs within a dedup window
Blacklisted companies filtered during dedup phase
AI matching scrubs PII before cloud transfer
Deck actions must route through the useDeckStack state machine (ADR-030)
crossDomainInteractions: Drives Connector/Module Integration for search + AI matching
Promotes StagedVacancy into the Job Application Tracking domain
Triggers Data Enrichment and Notifications on run completion

nodes.name: Connector / Module Integration
nodes.summary: An Anti-Corruption Layer following the App-Connector-Module pattern. Pluggable Modules (EURES, Arbeitsagentur, JSearch, Ollama/OpenAI/DeepSeek, Logo.dev, ESCO, NUTS) self-describe via Manifests and register into one unified registry with credential PUSH, resilience policies, health monitoring and degradation rules.

businessRules: Modules communicate with the App only via shared domain types (DiscoveredVacancy, ConnectorResult)
Admin-gated activation/deactivation (Tier A/B/C admin rule)
Deactivation pauses dependent automations
Degradation: auth failure pauses immediately, 5 failed runs or 3 circuit-breaker opens pause
Enrichment is best-effort, non-blocking, cache-before-chain
crossDomainInteractions: Serves Vacancy Discovery & Staging (search + AI match)
Enriches Company logos/deep-links for Job Application Tracking
Provides reference-data lookups (ISO 3166, NUTS, holidays) to CRM

nodes.name: CRM & Network
nodes.summary: A personal CRM where Person is an independent aggregate root (recruiters, hiring managers, referrals). Tracks interviews, tasks and notes with polymorphic targets, a materialized activity-log timeline, person-to-person connections, and GDPR provenance/anonymization.

businessRules: Person state machine: active <-> archived, active -> anonymized (terminal)
Polymorphic targets enforce exactly-one-of person/company/job
At-most-one-primary-company per Person
Anonymize cascades across notes/tasks/job-contacts/activity references
CRM cron archives expired auto-created persons and fires reminders
crossDomainInteractions: Links Persons to Jobs via JobContact (Job Application Tracking)
Supplies the connection graph consumed by Inside Track warm-path discovery
Uses reference-data lookups from Connector/Module Integration

nodes.name: Inside Track (Referrals & Network)
nodes.summary: Leverages the user's CRM network to find a way in. Records insider tips and network tips against target companies, runs referrals through a state machine, discovers warm-introduction paths through the connection graph, and converts a referral into an actual Job application.

businessRules: Referral state transitions validated by a shared transition core (engage/relay/review/decline/revive)
Warm-path discovery is a read-only Open Host Service capped at depth 2
Consent-blocked persons are never surfaced on any 1-hop or 2-hop path (@guarantee ExcludesConsentBlockedPersons)
Paths ranked active-before-former and by connection strength (close > medium > weak)
All queries userId-scoped (ADR-015)
crossDomainInteractions: Reads the Person + PersonConnection graph from CRM & Network
Commits a referral into a Job application in Job Application Tracking
Respects CRM consent/GDPR state when surfacing intermediaries

nodes.name: Notifications
nodes.summary: Multi-channel notification delivery. A ChannelRouter fans a notification draft out to all enabled channels (in-app, webhook, email, browser push) using a per-dispatch DispatchContext, with HMAC-signed webhooks, SMTP email, VAPID push, retries, rate limits and SSRF protection.

businessRules: All notification writes go through the enforced-writer leaf (structured late-binding fields populated)
DispatchContext built fresh per dispatch, channels never query DB for context
Webhook: 3 retries, auto-deactivate after 5 consecutive failures, SSRF-validated URLs
Email TLS enforced, rate-limited 10/min; push rate-limited 20/min
Single-writer rule enforced by check-notification-writers.sh
crossDomainInteractions: Notified by Vacancy Discovery & Staging on run/degradation events
Notified by CRM cron on interview/task reminders
Notified by Identity/Auth & GDPR on account-deletion confirmation

nodes.name: Identity / Auth & GDPR
nodes.summary: Account lifecycle, authentication and data-protection controls. Handles signup/signin with rate limiting and credential-leak defense, privacy settings, PII egress redaction for cloud AI, and signed-token account deletion. Admin authority is a tiered rule (no RBAC model).

businessRules: Signin rate-limited 5/15min, signup 3/60min per IP; double-gated E2E bypass prod-inert
PII redaction sourced only from @/lib/pii before third-party transfer (fail-safe redact when locality unknown)
Account deletion via signed confirmation token, cancellable
Admin status via tiered ADMIN_USER_IDS / single-user / fail-closed rule
Never trust client-submitted userId
crossDomainInteractions: Scopes every other domain's queries by the session user (IDOR enforcement)
Triggers Notifications for account-deletion confirmation
Defines PII redaction policy applied by Vacancy Discovery AI matching and CRM anonymization

nodes.name: Track a Job Through Its Lifecycle
nodes.summary: Create a job application and advance it through the status pipeline on the Kanban board with validated transitions and history logging.

nodes.name: Browse & Manage Jobs
nodes.summary: Query the paginated, filtered, searchable list of the user's jobs and view individual job details.

nodes.name: Run a Discovery Automation
nodes.summary: Execute a full discovery pipeline: search external modules, dedupe, filter blacklist, fetch details, AI-match against the resume, stage vacancies and finalize the run schedule.

nodes.name: Triage Staged Vacancies
nodes.summary: Review discovered vacancies in the deck/list UI and act on them — promote keepers into Jobs, dismiss, archive, trash or bulk-process them.

nodes.name: Configure an Automation
nodes.summary: Create or update an automation: validate input against the module registry, validate connector params, compute the schedule, and pause/resume/delete with run-coordinator guards.

nodes.name: Register & Resolve Modules
nodes.summary: Modules self-register their manifests into the unified registry at startup; the runner resolves credentials via PUSH and builds resilience policies before instantiation.

nodes.name: Manage Module Lifecycle
nodes.summary: Admin activates or deactivates a module; deactivation pauses dependent automations, and degradation rules auto-pause on auth failure, repeated run failures or circuit-breaker trips.

nodes.name: Enrich Company Data
nodes.summary: Best-effort, non-blocking enrichment of company logos and deep-links via a fallback chain orchestrator, triggered by domain events with cache-before-chain.

nodes.name: Manage Contacts
nodes.summary: Create, read, update, archive, reactivate and merge CRM Person records with value-object parsing and state-machine validation.

nodes.name: Schedule Interviews & Tasks
nodes.summary: Run the interview lifecycle state machine (schedule, complete, cancel, reschedule) and manage CRM tasks/notes with polymorphic targets.

nodes.name: Map Person Connections
nodes.summary: Build the relationship graph by adding, listing and removing directed person-to-person connections with kind/strength validation, ownership checks, dedupe and a cap.

nodes.name: Record & Progress a Referral
nodes.summary: Record an insider tip or network tip against an owned company and move the referral through its lifecycle (engage, relay, review, decline, revive).

nodes.name: Find a Warm Introduction Path
nodes.summary: Given a target company, reveal how the user is connected: 1-hop insiders (contacts with a company association, incl. former) and 2-hop network paths through person connections — capped at depth 2, consent-blocked persons excluded, ranked by recency and connection strength.

nodes.name: Commit a Referral to an Application
nodes.summary: Convert a referral into a real Job application: resolve the applied status, upsert the job title, create the job and seed its status history.

nodes.name: Dispatch a Multi-Channel Notification
nodes.summary: Build a per-dispatch context once, then route a notification draft through the ChannelRouter to every enabled channel (in-app, webhook, email, push) with retries and rate limits.

nodes.name: Configure Notification Channels
nodes.summary: Manage webhook endpoints, SMTP config and browser-push subscriptions in Settings, with SSRF validation, encrypted secrets and per-channel test buttons.

nodes.name: Authenticate a User
nodes.summary: Sign up or sign in with IP rate limiting, duplicate-email rejection, password hashing and credential-leak defense around NextAuth.

nodes.name: Manage Privacy & Account Deletion
nodes.summary: Update privacy settings, govern PII redaction policy for cloud AI transfer, and run the signed-token account-deletion request/confirm/cancel lifecycle.

nodes.name: Create the Job
nodes.summary: Validate input against the AddJob schema and create a Job with related location, source and initial status.

nodes.name: Validate the Status Transition
nodes.summary: Compute and check valid transitions for the current status before applying a change.

nodes.name: Apply Status Change
nodes.summary: Transition the Job to a new status with optimistic-locking version check.

nodes.name: Log Status History
nodes.summary: Append a status-history entry recording the transition for audit and analytics.

nodes.name: Reorder on Kanban
nodes.summary: Reorder the Job within/across Kanban columns, updating sort order and optionally status.

nodes.name: Query the Job List
nodes.summary: Run the paginated, filtered, searchable job-list query scoped to the current user.

nodes.name: View Job Details
nodes.summary: Fetch a single job with its related details, notes and tags.

nodes.name: Build Kanban Board
nodes.summary: Build the dynamic Kanban board grouped by per-user status categories.

nodes.name: Request the Run
nodes.summary: Route the run through the RunCoordinator's per-automation mutex to prevent double execution.

nodes.name: Search via Module Connector
nodes.summary: Invoke the configured module connector to search the external job board for vacancies.

nodes.name: Dedupe & Blacklist Filter
nodes.summary: Build the dedup key set from existing vacancies/jobs within the window and filter blacklisted companies.

nodes.name: AI-Match Against Resume
nodes.summary: Build a PII-scrubbed job prompt and run AI job-to-resume matching, mapping provider errors to outcomes.

nodes.name: Stage Vacancies
nodes.summary: Persist matched vacancies as StagedVacancy records with their match data.

nodes.name: Finalize the Run
nodes.summary: Finalize the run record, compute the next-run time and trigger consecutive-failure degradation if needed.

nodes.name: List Staged Vacancies
nodes.summary: Query the paginated staged-vacancy list with status/tab filters and search.

nodes.name: Promote to Job
nodes.summary: Promote a staged vacancy into a real Job via the promoter, with audit logging.

nodes.name: Dismiss / Archive / Trash
nodes.summary: Apply a single-card lifecycle action (dismiss, archive, trash, restore) to a staged vacancy.

nodes.name: Bulk Action
nodes.summary: Apply a bulk lifecycle action across multiple staged vacancies at once.

nodes.name: Validate Against Module Registry
nodes.summary: Check the chosen module exists in the registry and validate its connector params.

nodes.name: Create or Update Automation
nodes.summary: Persist the automation and recompute its schedule and connector params.

nodes.name: Pause / Resume / Delete
nodes.summary: Pause, resume or delete an automation, guarding against an in-flight run via the run coordinator.

nodes.name: Self-Register Manifest
nodes.summary: Each module imports for its side effect and registers its manifest + factory into the unified registry.

nodes.name: Resolve Credentials (PUSH)
nodes.summary: Resolve credentials from manifest config (DB -> Env -> Default) before module instantiation.

nodes.name: Build Resilience Policy
nodes.summary: Build a Cockatiel resilience policy (retry, circuit breaker, rate limit) from the manifest.

nodes.name: Authorize Admin Action
nodes.summary: Gate activation/deactivation on the tiered admin rule and the admin-action rate limit.

nodes.name: Activate / Deactivate Module
nodes.summary: Toggle module state; deactivation pauses affected automations and emits ModuleDeactivated.

nodes.name: Health Check & Degrade
nodes.summary: Run health checks and apply degradation rules (auth failure, run failures, circuit-breaker trips).

nodes.name: Cache-Before-Chain Check
nodes.summary: Check the DB for existing fresh enrichment results before executing the fallback chain.

nodes.name: Execute Fallback Chain
nodes.summary: Run modules in the dimension's fallback chain; first success wins, remaining modules skipped.

nodes.name: Persist Result & Publish Events
nodes.summary: Persist the EnrichmentResult, append an EnrichmentLog entry, and publish enrichment domain events.

nodes.name: Create Person
nodes.summary: Create a CRM Person aggregate with value-object parsing and GDPR provenance fields.

nodes.name: List & Search Persons
nodes.summary: Run the filtered, searchable Person list query scoped to the current user.

nodes.name: Update with State-Machine Validation
nodes.summary: Update a Person with state-machine and at-most-one-primary-company validation.

nodes.name: Merge Persons
nodes.summary: Merge two Person records, transferring associations and resolving conflicts to a winner.

nodes.name: Schedule Interview
nodes.summary: Create a scheduled interview and emit the InterviewScheduled domain event.

nodes.name: Complete / Cancel / Reschedule
nodes.summary: Apply the interview state-machine transitions (complete, cancel, reschedule).

nodes.name: Manage Tasks & Notes
nodes.summary: Create CRM tasks and notes with polymorphic targets (exactly-one of person/company/job).

nodes.name: Add Connection
nodes.summary: Validate kind/strength, verify ownership of both persons, dedupe, enforce a cap, and create the connection.

nodes.name: List Connections
nodes.summary: List a person's connections scoped to the user.

nodes.name: Remove Connection
nodes.summary: Remove a person-to-person connection after ownership verification.

nodes.name: Record Insider Tip
nodes.summary: Create an insider-tip referral after asserting usable persons and an owned company.

nodes.name: Record Network Tip
nodes.summary: Record a network-tip referral tying a person to an owned company.

nodes.name: Transition Referral State
nodes.summary: Validate and apply a referral state transition (engage/relay/review/decline/revive) via the shared core.

nodes.name: Authorize Viewer
nodes.summary: Require an authenticated session; scope the entire query to the viewer's userId (ADR-015).

nodes.name: Find 1-Hop Insiders
nodes.summary: Coarse-prefilter persons by the company JSON, then exact-match the companyId via parseCompanies to collect insiders (incl. former associations).

nodes.name: Exclude Consent-Blocked Persons
nodes.summary: Drop any consent-blocked person so no blocked Person is ever surfaced on a 1-hop or 2-hop path (@guarantee ExcludesConsentBlockedPersons).

nodes.name: Find 2-Hop Network Paths
nodes.summary: Find contacts (from_person) who know an insider via a directed PersonConnection, capped at depth 2.

nodes.name: Rank Paths
nodes.summary: Rank insiders active-before-former and network paths by connection strength (close > medium > weak; unknown last).

nodes.name: Resolve Applied Status & Title
nodes.summary: Resolve the applied job status and upsert the job title before creating the job.

nodes.name: Create Job & Seed History
nodes.summary: Create the Job from the referral and seed its initial status history.

nodes.name: Build Dispatch Context
nodes.summary: Consolidate all per-user notification context into a fresh DispatchContext via parallel queries.

nodes.name: Route to Enabled Channels
nodes.summary: Fan the draft out to every enabled channel via the ChannelRouter using the context's availability flags.

nodes.name: Deliver Webhook (HMAC + Retry)
nodes.summary: HMAC-sign, SSRF-validate, deliver with retries, and auto-deactivate the endpoint after consecutive failures.

nodes.name: Deliver Email & Push
nodes.summary: Send TLS-enforced SMTP email and VAPID browser push to all subscriptions, with rate limits and stale-subscription cleanup.

nodes.name: Manage Webhook Endpoints
nodes.summary: CRUD webhook endpoints with client+server SSRF validation, encrypted secrets and a max-10-per-user cap.

nodes.name: Manage SMTP Config
nodes.summary: Save, test and delete SMTP config with host SSRF validation and at-rest password encryption.

nodes.name: Manage Push Subscriptions
nodes.summary: Subscribe/unsubscribe browser push, auto-generate VAPID keys, send test pushes and rotate keys.

nodes.name: Sign Up
nodes.summary: Rate-limit by IP, validate the form, reject duplicate emails and hash the password.

nodes.name: Sign In
nodes.summary: Wrap NextAuth signIn with IP rate-limiting and a delay to mitigate credential-stuffing.

nodes.name: Update Privacy Settings
nodes.summary: Update privacy preferences that govern PII redaction policy and data-sharing behavior.

nodes.name: Request Account Deletion
nodes.summary: Generate a signed confirmation token and dispatch a confirmation notification.

nodes.name: Confirm / Cancel Deletion
nodes.summary: Confirm the deletion (terminal data removal) or cancel a pending request.

edges.description: Discovery automations invoke module connectors to search job boards and AI-match vacancies against the resume.
Promoting a staged vacancy creates a real Job in the application tracker.
Run-completion and degradation events fan out as multi-channel notifications.
Data-enrichment populates Company logos and deep-links on tracked jobs.
Reference-data modules (ISO 3166, NUTS, holidays) supply lookups for Person address/holiday fields.
Warm-path discovery and referrals read the Person + PersonConnection graph and respect CRM consent state.
Committing a referral converts it into a Job application.
JobContact links CRM Persons (recruiters, hiring managers) to specific Jobs.
CRM cron fires interview and task reminders that become notifications.
Account-deletion requests dispatch a signed-token confirmation notification.
PII egress redaction policy governs what discovery AI matching may transfer to cloud providers.
GDPR consent/anonymization rules constrain how Person data is stored and surfaced.
